title: April 11th, 2021 (2)
body:
- daily notes
    - akabilly
    - professional
        - the only habits i have are addictions lyrics
            - the only habits i have are addictions
            - the rest are just fiction
            - the more that i say the less that i listen
            - the moral the story isn't the point
            - this joint is  a pinion
            - push a point forth and i'm pinned in
            - tried to point north now i'm spinning
            - used to point god now i'm sitting
            - i hope you don't think i'm conceited
            - i know time's undefeated
            - my conceit is
            - it takes two to play a championship
            - it takes you to make me feel different
            - i made life a cocoon you couldn't see me in
            - but i fly too high to try that anymore
            - now i make music with these wings and hope you got a dial tone and a dial to tune in to me with when it rings
            - that's my calling
            - if you need to break out too i know you can do it
            - i don't need to push through it
            - my secretions ain't secret
            - if you ain't leaking
            - i don't need to push fluids
            - my great weakness is seasons
            - i can't stay when i'm moving somewhere else to keep eating and not freezing
            - i hope you intuit my meaning and don't wipe out the tracks that i'm leaving to get back to ya
        - everywhere i go i go alone lyrics
            - everywhere i go i go alone
            - when i get there i open up
            - to make myself known to new friends
            - i know i'm never gonna see again when i get back home
            - that's the way it's always been when im flowing
            - water only gets you wet when touching you
            - birds only land and sit when our work is through
            - but we seed the e[[[[[[[[art]]]]]]]]h with flowers
            - quench em with these passing showers
            - don't mention it, this is all of ours
            - don't let me get in your way
            - nest and rest after everything you did to get this far
            - i hear a new sound out past the horizon
            - i'm a make contact while i still got my eyes in
            - see you when i see you
            - i'll come find you while you're flying
            - be you and i will too
            - be well
            - let it be known i can still feel you when i hold you in my mind's eye
            - that p[[[[[[[[art]]]]]]]] makes the distance bearable
            - that strap makes the watch wearable
            - that's why i carry you in here
            - that's why i married you in here
            - cuz i'm in here wherever this ship goes
            - it's not on autopilot but steering is difficult
            - and some times i get stuck staring at screens, analog and digital
            - dig in on a mission missing signs that i'm missing you
            - lose track of the time that your living through
            - it's hard to imagine what i'm missing too
            - so back of my mind i'm miserable
            - still grieving all that i've lost from leaving
            - every different school
            - every conversation, every p[[[[[[[[art]]]]]]]]y, every clique and group
            - they put me in, i didn't click, i felt invisible
            - every church, every congregation, every ritual
            - everyone that wouldn't listen to my symptoms if i didn't give em proof
            - everyone that can't fit through the cracks that i slip into
            - i'm carving [[[[[[[[art]]]]]]]] in the darkness on cold stone hoping it gets to you
            - i'm marking out a new path on an old map knowing you might unfold it when you see something worth getting to
            - i got adhd which one could take to mean i'm lazy, crazy, and, hazy, amazing at mazes, amused by musing, cagey about cages, do what i'm doing not what i was
            - i want this amount of repetition, no less and no more
            - i'm like "cool, you can go get that at the store"
            - that's not what this is for
            - i'm unbound by technique
            - you could be too
            - but you think you get your power cuz ya bow to the king
            - cower in that castle feeling safe cuz you kissed the ring
            - no choices for beggars
            - my voice is better than none when you're facing the terrors that come from the void
            - that's all i'm ever offering to see it together
            - i'm a letter not the law
            - i never said you had to fall in line
            - to gather anything mine
            - i'm not the measuring kind
            - i take pleasure in the digging
            - not the terra firma
            - i find a feather i'm flying
            - whether with or without a flock i'll be fine
            - until the weather decline
            - i'm tender but tend to not have a lot
            - i'm not buying the lines that they censure
            - and pretend are divine
            - no gods and no heroes
            - lotta ones and one zero
            - st[[[[[[[[art]]]]]]]]ing is trivial
            - ending extra judicial
            - framing is criminal
            - and naming is digital
            - please consider who
            - you give a finger to
            - i'm non violent
            - i don't kick rhymes
            - or punch lines
            - i slide in and stunt drives
            - he tried to gun it like one time
            - i looked at him once like
            - what do you want guy
            - you got steed and steel you thinking dark knight
            - i'm on my horse looking at a long road wondering where i'm going to park nights
            - where i'm going the opponent is hard to fight if you don't notice the omens
            - unmask him like oh shit yeah i know him from back before he was key holding
            - i said before this wasn't forever
            - i let em know this isn't for everyone
            - only the ones who get it
            - opinions are like assholes
            - hear em in close qu[[[[[[[[art]]]]]]]]ers
            - no one wants to claim em
            - everybody laugh though
    - professional
